dashboards.name: 📊 Fraud Overview Dashboard
dashboards.description: نظرة عامة على حالة الاحتيال في النظام

cards.name: Fraud Summary
cards.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_claims, SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fraud_claims, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS fraud_rate FROM dbo.Claims

cards.name: Fraud by Risk Level
cards.query: SELECT risk_level, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dbo.Claims WHERE risk_level IS NOT NULL GROUP BY risk_level

cards.name: Top 10 Risk Providers
cards.query: SELECT TOP 10 provider_id, COUNT(*) AS claims, SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fraud, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_fraud = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS fraud_rate FROM dbo.Claims WHERE provider_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY provider_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY fraud_rate DESC
